---
title: "Buoyant Weight"
author: "Jill Ashey"
date: "2026-05-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
```

Read in BW data 
```{r}
bw_data <- read.csv("../data/Physiology/buoyant_weight_experiment.csv", header = T)
```

```{r}
# 1. Separate the Dry Plug weights to use as a reference
plug_weights <- bw_data %>%
  filter(Sample == "Dry plug") %>%
  select(SampleID, PlugWeight = Weight_g)

# 2. Filter for Coral measurements and join with plug weights
corals <- bw_data %>%
  filter(Sample == "Coral") %>%
  filter(!grepl("pHi", SampleID)) %>% # remove pHi samples for now
  left_join(plug_weights, by = "SampleID") %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date, format = "%m/%d/%y"))

# 3. Define Constants
rho_ske <- 2.93 # density of aragonite
# Simple function for seawater density (kg/m3 converted to g/cm3) at 35ppt
calc_rho_sw <- function(temp) {
  (999.842594 + (6.793952e-2 * temp) - (9.095290e-3 * temp^2) + 
   (1.001685e-4 * temp^3) - (1.120083e-6 * temp^4) + (6.536332e-9 * temp^5)) / 1000
}

# 4. Perform Calculations
corals_calc <- corals %>%
  mutate(
    rho_sw = calc_rho_sw(Temperature_C),
    # Net buoyant weight of the coral alone
    net_buoy_g = Weight_g - PlugWeight,
    # Convert to dry skeletal weight
    dry_skeletal_weight = net_buoy_g / (1 - (rho_sw / rho_ske))
  )

# 5. Calculate change relative to the first day (5/6/26)
growth_data <- corals_calc %>%
  group_by(SampleID) %>%
  arrange(Date) %>%
  mutate(Weight_Change = dry_skeletal_weight - first(dry_skeletal_weight)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # Extract Treatment from SampleID (A = Ambient, H = High)
  mutate(Treatment = ifelse(grepl("-A", SampleID), "Ambient", "High"))

ggplot(growth_data, aes(x = Date, y = dry_skeletal_weight, color = Treatment, group = SampleID)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) + 
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "Date",
       y = "Calculated Dry Skeletal Weight (g)") +
  theme_minimal()
```
